llmResponse.agenda_changes: Two changes announced: (1) Item 8.5 (Approval of 2024 School Accountability Report Cards) pulled from consent agenda due to incorrect information from CalPads; (2) Item 11.2 (Recommendation for Mathematics Curriculum Adoption for Grades 6-8) moved from Information section to School/Community Reports, positioned after Orion presentation (6.1) and before Connect Charter Public Hearing (7.1)
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: All right. And that was without 8.5 which we had pulled from the agenda.
